---
title: MJML
icon: Code
description: Build responsive email templates with MJML
---

<Callout type="warn">
The MJML adapter is not yet implemented. The `@betternotify/mjml` package exists but throws `NotifyRpcNotImplementedError` at runtime. This adapter will ship in a future release.
</Callout>

## Planned design

MJML is a markup language that compiles to responsive HTML email. The `@betternotify/mjml` adapter will take MJML source (as a string or file path) and compile it at render time, producing the HTML and optional plain text that the email channel needs.

The planned API:

```ts
import { mjmlTemplate } from '@betternotify/mjml';

const welcome = rpc
  .email()
  .input(z.object({ name: z.string() }))
  .subject(({ input }) => `Welcome, ${input.name}!`)
  .template(mjmlTemplate('./emails/welcome.mjml'));
```

MJML is a good fit when you want responsive email layouts without hand-writing the table-based HTML that email clients require, and your team prefers a markup language over React components.
